name: 细胞呼吸
subject: biology
domain_name: 分子与细胞 / Molecules & Cells / Molecules & Cells
curriculum_points: HS-LS1-7: Use a model to illustrate that cellular respiration is a chemical process whereby the bonds of food molecules and oxygen molecules are broken and the bonds in new compounds are formed, resulting in a net transfer of energy.
